calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For An Order On Unlawful Use
Of Personal Indentifying Information
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Osama Abasi, Esq. 888-273-4353 Garfield Legal PC for Petitioner
No other Appearance.

Party states appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Mr. Abasi presents arguments; interpretation of "may", fraudulent.
Court comments; set limits on folks from all over the world, no service of process.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner's unopposed Petition For An Order On Unlawful Use.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
